card_name_verified: HSBC Premier Credit Card / HSBC Premier World Mastercard ($95 AF, waived for Private Banking customers)

recurring_credits.name: Streaming Subscription Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $5/month statement credit on subscription payments under MCC 4899 (Cable, Satellite, Other Pay TV / Radio Services), capped at $60 per calendar year.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: eligible to receive a streaming credit of up to $5 a month in statement credits for subscription payments... up to a maximum of $60 in total statement credits per calendar year

_review_reason: Dup of hsbc-premier-world-mastercard resolved 2026-04-28 — kept hsbc-premier per naming convention (issuer-product, no network/tier descriptor, matches pattern like amex-platinum / chase-sapphire-reserve / capital-one-venture). HSBC GE/TSA $85-every-54-months credit reclassified as 'benefit' (not recurring_credit) per Kacey 2026-04-28 — labeled in _excluded.
_excluded: $85 Global Entry/TSA PreCheck/NEXUS application fee credit, every 54 months (4.5 years) → BENEFIT category, NOT recurring_credit. HSBC official wording: 'Only one statement credit will be issued even if multiple applications were purchased' and '54 months (4.5 years)' cadence is unique to HSBC.
Annual fee waiver via points redemption (operational, not RC)
